segments.text: The proverbs of Solomon:
A wise son makes a glad father,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: But a foolish son is the grief of his mother.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Treasures of wickedness profit nothing,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: But righteousness delivers from death.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: The Lord will not allow the righteous soul to famish,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: But He casts away the desire of the wicked.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: He who has a slack hand becomes poor,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: But the hand of the diligent makes rich.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: He who gathers in summer is a wise son;
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: He who sleeps in harvest is a son who causes shame.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Blessings are on the head of the righteous,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: But violence covers the mouth of the wicked.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: The memory of the righteous is blessed,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: But the name of the wicked will rot.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: The wise in heart will receive commands,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: But a prating fool will fall.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: He who walks with integrity walks securely,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: But he who perverts his ways will become known.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: He who winks with the eye causes trouble,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: But a prating fool will fall.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: The mouth of the righteous is a well of life,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: But violence covers the mouth of the wicked.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Hatred stirs up strife,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: But love covers all sins.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Wisdom is found on the lips of him who has understanding,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: But a rod is for the back of him who is devoid of understanding.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Wise people store up knowledge,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: But the mouth of the foolish is near destruction.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: The rich man's wealth is his strong city;
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: The destruction of the poor is their poverty.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: The labor of the righteous leads to life,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: The wages of the wicked to sin.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: He who keeps instruction is in the way of life,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: But he who refuses correction goes astray.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: Whoever hides hatred has lying lips,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: And whoever spreads slander is a fool.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: In the multitude of words sin is not lacking,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: But he who restrains his lips is wise.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: The tongue of the righteous is choice silver;
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: The heart of the wicked is worth little.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: The lips of the righteous feed many,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: But fools die for lack of wisdom.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: The blessing of the Lord makes one rich,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: And He adds no sorrow with it.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: To do evil is like sport to a fool,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: But a man of understanding has wisdom.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: The fear of the wicked will come upon him,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: And the desire of the righteous will be granted.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: When the whirlwind passes by, the wicked is no more,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: But the righteous has an everlasting foundation.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: As vinegar to the teeth and smoke to the eyes, So is the lazy man to those who send him.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: The fear of the Lord prolongs days,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: But the years of the wicked will be shortened.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The hope of the righteous will be gladness,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: But the expectation of the wicked will perish.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: The way of the Lord is strength for the upright,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: But destruction will come to the workers of iniquity.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The righteous will never be removed,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: But the wicked will not inhabit the earth.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: The mouth of the righteous brings forth wisdom,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: But the perverse tongue will be cut out.
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: The lips of the righteous know what is acceptable,
segments.speaker: Solomon

segments.text: But the mouth of the wicked what is perverse.
segments.speaker: Solomon
